name: Maple Chiffon Cake
recipeInstructions:
------------
1. Sift together the cake flour, granulated sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Stir in the brown sugar.
3. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
4. Add the salad oil, egg yolks, cold water, and maple flavoring to the well.
5. Beat until the batter is satin smooth.
6. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites with cream of tartar until very stiff peaks form.
7. Pour the batter into the egg whites in thin streams, folding gently with a spatula.
8. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
9. Transfer the batter to an ungreased 10-inch tube pan and bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
10. Invert the pan and let cool.
11. Prepare the frosting by melting butter or margarine in a saucepan over low heat until it turns golden brown (be careful not to scorch).
12. Remove from heat and add sifted confectioners' sugar, melted butter, vanilla or maple flavoring, and light cream. Beat until it reaches a spreading consistency.
13. Frost the cooled cake.
